flashcards.definition: Light bounces off a surface; angle of incidence = angle of reflection.
Light bends when passing between media with different optical densities.
n₁ sin θ₁ = n₂ sin θ₂; relates angles and indices of refraction.
n = c/v; ratio of light speed in vacuum to speed in the medium.
A line perpendicular to the surface at the point of incidence.
